caption: The video displays a static graphic screen with a deep navy blue background. Centered in the upper half of the screen is the text "Tak fordi du så med." in a white, sans-serif font. Below this text is the logo for Aarhus Universitet, which consists of a stylized, white abstract symbol resembling a curved letter "A" or "U" placed above the words "AARHUS UNIVERSITET" written in all-capital, white letters. There are no people, objects, or movement present in the scene. The visual composition remains identical across the sequence, showing a constant, unmoving image of the university's closing slide.
